Wear Time

The following object is masked from 'package:graphics':

    layout
this_id = 12
this_session = 1

sync = ds %>% filter(id == this_id & session == this_session) %>% 
  mutate(wear_status = as.numeric(wear_status == "worn"))

sync$inf_wear = SMA(sync[,"wear_status"], 30)

p1 <- sync %>% ggplot(aes(x = time_plot, y = inf_wear)) +
    geom_line(linetype = 1, color = "blue") +
    scale_y_continuous(name = "Wear", breaks = c(0,1), labels = c("0%", "100%"), limits = c(0,1))
ggplotly(p = p1)
